description: Baseline measurement: 7.5s total startup. TSC check is the bottleneck at ~4s

asi.opportunity: TSC check is blocking, can parallelize or optimize

description: Optimized Docker healthcheck: interval 5s→1s, start_period added. Docker ready time: 895ms→530ms

asi.tsc_variability: TSC times vary between runs, may be cache-related

description: Updated benchmark simulates pnpm dev. Breakdown: docker 556ms, package builds 949ms, nextjs 1615ms. Total: 3.1s

asi.breakdown: Package builds ~950ms, Next.js ~1.6s. TSC was actually package builds
asi.nextjs_bottleneck: Next.js is the largest remaining bottleneck

description: Reverted sourcemap changes - they caused issues. Back to stable ~3.2s baseline

asi.rollback_reason: Sourcemap changes caused 4s Next.js startup time

description: Removed tsc from mcp-server build - esbuild only. Package builds: 1000ms→500ms. Total: 3.2s→3.0s

asi.mcp-server: Removed tsc, using esbuild only (12ms vs 1200ms)
asi.tradeoff: Next.js startup slightly slower but overall better
